markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX Labs and Homebase to discuss content strategy and execution.](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Early signs of content ranking and driving signups are promising, need to double down on high-impact areas like payroll](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Discussed creating an "ultimate guide" style piece focused on jobs-to-be-done for restaurant owners/managers as a content hub](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Opportunity to better target "shift notes" style content addressing very specific pain points and tying to Homebase's solutions](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Prioritizing payroll-related content as it's a major revenue driver for Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Prioritization

  - [Seeing some early traction with content ranking quickly and driving a couple signups already](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Prioritizing payroll-related content as it's a huge opportunity area for Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Removing date from URLs could help with older content re-optimization](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)

### Jobs-to-Be-Done Content Cluster

  - [Idea to create a massive "checklist" style guide for restaurant owners/managers covering all jobs-to-be-done](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Each item could have a short explanation and tie to how Homebase solves that particular need](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Could start as a blog post series and evolve into a downloadable PDF lead magnet](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Allows very intentional, value-added internal linking vs. just random anchor links](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

### Shift Notes & Pain Point Content

  - [Opportunity to create "shift notes" style pieces addressing very granular, job-specific pain points](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [E.g. "How to handle last minute call-outs" and highlight how Homebase's AI assistant can solve](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Enables capturing demand around these niche but valuable topics](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prioritize payroll-related content optimization and creation](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Explore "ultimate guide" cluster content idea for restaurant owner jobs-to-be-done](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Identify opportunities for granular "shift notes" style content tied to product capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Implement simple lead capture (pop-up, etc.) to build an email list from high-value content](https://fathom.video/share/hPokj3Ax49GgfySku3xRew2uQCva-kXd?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
